name: Release of Claim to Exemption by Custodial Parent

eligibility.description: Parents must be divorced, separated, or living apart for the last 6 months of the year and provide >50% of the child's support.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a noncustodial parent to claim a child as a dependent if the custodial parent signs a written declaration (Form 8332) releasing the claim.
